title: Advanced HeroQuest - Let's Play - Finale - Rolling All the Ones
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SCwP-bR498o

The title says it all. Daniel's Advanced HeroQuest campaign reaches its finale — and the dice have chosen violence against the player. Back-to-back episodes bring the mini-series to a close as the party makes their final push for the stolen lantern, contending with reinforcement rolls, miscalculated damage, and a statistical anomaly's worth of ones.

Despite the dice conspiracy, the campaign wraps with the kind of chaotic energy that makes solo dungeon crawling memorable. Daniel's honest assessment: don't use his channel to learn how to play. Do use it to see why the game is worth playing anyway.

----

What's your worst dice betrayal story — the roll that should have been a triumph but wasn't?
